name: MHA- Nomu Apocalypse
description:
Welcome to the Nomu Apocalypse!~

Just when everyone thought everything was going smoothly. Dr. Garaki stupid Nomu creation went haywire. The Nomus stop following orders from Dr. Garaki, AFO, and the League of Villains. They now just bite people or eat them. If you get bitten you turn into a mindless Nomu. Good luck

Everyone are 18 years old but the war never happened…

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
